{{Quote|It's an unexplored system in Gradilis sector, right on the boundary between Wild Space and the Unknown Regions. It's listed as the Nirauan system, so someone must have visited the place, but there's no other data.|[[Shirlee Faughn]]|<ref name="SotP" />}}
The '''Gradilis sector''' was a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] that contained the [[Nirauan system/Legends|Nirauan system]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==History==
The Gradilis sector was a poorly charted [[Sector/Legends|sector]] located in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]], near the boundary with the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]].<ref name="SotP" /> It was classed as a [[Freestanding subsectors/Legends|freestanding subsector]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was poorly explored with insufficiently documentation before the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]]. Yet, the sector was not given a formal status when incorporated into the Empire and was not represented in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]].<ref name="TEA" />

The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nirauan/Legends|Nirauan]] was the location of the [[Hand of Thrawn]], a secret base established by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] to rule his [[Empire of the Hand]].<ref name="VotF" />
